🌿 Turn Your Black Thumb Green! (Without Killing a Single Plant in the Process)

Your friendly guide to choosing & caring for houseplants that actually thrive in your space

Staring at that empty corner of your room, wondering which plant won't turn into a sad, crispy mess this time? Been there, killed that. Every plant parent started somewhere (usually with a graveyard of good intentions).
